action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 3 train.py crashed with 'AttributeError: DummyVecEnv object has no attribute save_running_average' after training walk task. The VecNormalize wrapper likely didn't retain the method properly, or the env variable got reverted. Analysis: We still have a saved walk model (ckpt/h1hand-walk-v0.zip) from the successful model.save call before the crash, but no normalization stats. We can evaluate immediately with a modified predict.py that falls back to random actions for tasks without checkpoints, to get a baseline success_rate and verify the pipeline. Decision: Update predict.py to handle missing checkpoints gracefully, and submit eval now with the existing checkpoint directory. Also write a corrected train.py that manually saves/loads VecNormalize stats using numpy, for future iterations. No training command this iteration to save time.
